Class GeminiSchemaAdapter

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.gemini.schema.GeminiSchemaAdapter
public class GeminiSchemaAdapter extends Object
Adapts the core framework's rich JSON schema generation into the simpler, native Google GenAI Schema objects required for function declarations.
Author:
anahata-gemini-pro-2.5

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private static final Map<Class<?>, com.google.genai.types.Type.Known>
    PRIMITIVE_MAP
    Internal mapping of Java primitive and wrapper types to native Google GenAI schema types.
    private static final com.google.genai.types.Schema
    VOID_SCHEMA
    A reusable schema instance representing the void type.

  • Field Details

    • PRIMITIVE_MAP

      private static final Map<Class<?>, com.google.genai.types.Type.Known> PRIMITIVE_MAP
      Internal mapping of Java primitive and wrapper types to native Google GenAI schema types.

    • VOID_SCHEMA

      private static final com.google.genai.types.Schema VOID_SCHEMA
      A reusable schema instance representing the void type.

    • GeminiSchemaAdapter

      public GeminiSchemaAdapter()

  • Method Details

    • getGeminiSchema

      public static com.google.genai.types.Schema getGeminiSchema(Type type) throws Exception
      Resolves a Java Type into a native Google GenAI Schema object.
      Parameters:
      type - The Java type to resolve.
      Returns:
      The corresponding Schema.
      Throws:
      Exception - if schema generation fails.

    • getGeminiSchema

      public static com.google.genai.types.Schema getGeminiSchema(Type type, boolean includeJsonSchemaId) throws Exception
      Resolves a Java Type into a native Google GenAI Schema object, with optional inclusion of the JSON Schema ID.
      Parameters:
      type - The Java type to resolve.
      includeJsonSchemaId - Whether to include the $id field.
      Returns:
      The corresponding Schema.
      Throws:
      Exception - if schema generation fails.

    • getGeminiSchema

      public static com.google.genai.types.Schema getGeminiSchema(String jsonSchema)
      Converts a raw JSON Schema string into a native Google GenAI Schema.

      Implementation details: Parses the JSON string into a map and performs a recursive walk to build the nested Google Schema hierarchy, including support for oneOf and anyOf polymorphic structures.

      Parameters:
      jsonSchema - The raw JSON Schema string.
      Returns:
      The corresponding Schema, or null if empty/void.

    • getGeminiSchema

      public static com.google.genai.types.Schema getGeminiSchema(Class<?> clazz) throws Exception
      Resolves a Java Class into a native Google GenAI Schema.
      Parameters:
      clazz - The class to resolve.
      Returns:
      The corresponding Schema.
      Throws:
      Exception - if schema generation fails.

    • buildSchemaFromMap

      private static com.google.genai.types.Schema buildSchemaFromMap(Map<String,Object> map)
      Recursively constructs a native Google GenAI Schema from a standard JSON Schema map.
      Parameters:
      map - The source schema map.
      Returns:
      The finalized native Schema.
